entries.definition:
and whoever does good, We shall increase it for him in goodness God is Most Forgiving, Most Thankful.
مَشْكُورًا mashkūran [pass. part.] gratefully accepted, generously rewarded (76:22) إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُمْ مَشْكُورًا this is your reward: your endeavours are appreciated.
entries.definition_english:
and whoever does good, We shall increase it for him in goodness God is Most Forgiving, Most Thankful.
مَشْكُورًا mashkūran [pass. part.] gratefully accepted, generously rewarded (76:22) إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُمْ مَشْكُورًا this is your reward: your endeavours are appreciated.

entries.definition:
sh–k–s to be stubborn in disputing, to be perverse, ill-natured, cross and quarrelsome. Of this root, only مُتَشَاكِسُونَ mutashākisūn occurs once in the Qurʾan.
مُتَشَاكِسُونَ mutashākisūn [pl. of act. part. مُتَشَاكِس mutashākis] quarrelsome, spitefully at variance with one another, in malicious disharmony with one another (39:29) ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا رَجُلًا فِيهِ شُرَكَاءُ مُتَشَاكِسُونَ God strikes a similitude of a man in whom [several] partners at odds with each other [as masters].
entries.definition_english:
sh–k–s to be stubborn in disputing, to be perverse, ill-natured, cross and quarrelsome. Of this root, only مُتَشَاكِسُونَ mutashākisūn occurs once in the Qurʾan.
مُتَشَاكِسُونَ mutashākisūn [pl. of act. part. مُتَشَاكِس mutashākis] quarrelsome, spitefully at variance with one another, in malicious disharmony with one another (39:29) ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا رَجُلًا فِيهِ شُرَكَاءُ مُتَشَاكِسُونَ God strikes a similitude of a man in whom [several] partners at odds with each other [as masters].
